articles.author: Victor Jack, Chris Lunday, Megan Messerly, Ferdinand Knapp
articles.title: Trump reignites Greenland feud with Europe at NATO - politico.eu
articles.description: Fresh call from U.S. president to annex the island pushes European leaders to unite behind Denmark.
articles.content:
When it comes to Denmark and Greenland itself we have a good process in place, Rutte said ahead of the three-hour leaders' meeting on Wednesday.
Allies can solve the problems inside NATO, said Polis… [+735 chars]
